titles.title: Jesus Came Down To Fight For Me

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He was worshipped in heaven Receiving honor, glory and praise Before there was a creation, I was locked up in Him Up there I fought with Michael When that old dragon was kicked out of heaven Now I'm in this terrestrial body Looking back at my victory

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And He looked at me Jesus saw I was in need Fighting this battle of good over evil So He descended to fight for me Jesus descended! Seven angels were seen in the cloud He has established His throne in my heart. Now all those devils are under my feet, Just when the enemy thought He'd destroyed me. Jesus came down to fight for me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He could have just created Another Bride to replace me And yet I know in Gethsemane, decided to marry me Lord I know I'm not worthy Shaped in iniquity I was born But now in Christ I am accepted From bondage of sin I am free

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The seven seals were opened; The seven thunders uttered their voice The hidden truth made simple was revealed to me The world will never accept it So my life to them seems like thunder Though I'm full of my shortcomings One day I will be like Him
